headline: Teledyne e2v Introduces Perciva™ 5D Camera: Occlusion-free 3D Vision for Industrial, Retail, and Robotic Imaging
summary: Teledyne e2v's Perciva 5D camera Teledyne e2v’s Perciva 5D camera generates 2D and 3D data from a single CMOS sensor GRENOBLE, France, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teledyne e2v, a Teledyne Technologies [NYSE: TDY] company and global innovator of imaging solutions, announces the launch of the Perciva™ 5D camera, a breakthrough imaging innovation designed to make high-quality short-range 3D vision cost-effective, reliable, and easy to integrate. Most industrial cameras only capture 2D images
